title: Eyes on arts: Upcoming entertainment highlights
bodyText:
Gallery

GEORGE ENTERTAINMENT NEWS - Georgians can pick and choose their weekend entertainment from a large variety of events.

Below is our weekly calendar for the arts: Eyes on arts. These entries are sent to George Herald on a weekly basis. Have a look and book your tickets for some stunning entertainment on your doorstep.

26 February to 8 March

Memoirs of a Chocolate Factory (19:00 with Saturday matinees 14:00) at George Arts Theatre. A vibrant, witty, and heartwarming musical that reimagines the beloved characters of the classic chocolate factory story - now grown up and facing a very different world. Tickets cost R120 (members R100) and are available through Computicket.

PHOTO GALLERY: Memoirs of a Chocolate Factory at George Arts Theatre

27 February

Rockin' All Over the World (19:00) at Market Theatre. Saxophonist Andrew Young tells stories of his global travels through music, accompanied by Cape Town pianist Tony Drake. Tickets cost R160 and are only available on his website, www.andrewyoung.net.

Rockin' All Over the World (19:00) at Market Theatre with Saxophonist Andrew Young.

2 Maart

Oceanic Heart met Luna Paige (deure open 14:00; vertoning begin 15:00) by George Arts Theatre. Hierdie talentvolle sanger-liedjieskrywer en storieverteller bring 'n versameling liedjies wat die omvattende aard van liefde vier. Kaartjies by die deur (R165) of aanlynkaartjies deur Quicket (R150). Pensioenarisse (aanlyn en by die deur) slegs R120. Vir navrae kontak 064 881 8392.

Oceanic Heart met Luna Paige by George Arts Theatre.

6 Maart

Joodse feesmaal vir Fynproewers (09:00) in die Bahia Bleu Restaurant by die Diaz Hotel, Mosselbaai. Tracy Klass van A Taste of Klass-faam stel die Suid-Kaap Fynproewersgilde bekend aan die wondere van die Joodse kookkuns. Klass, ook 'n bekende komediant, se liefde vir Joodse kos kom al die pad van haar twee Joodse tantes wat in Litaue gewoon het. Die wonderlikste smake, kleure en geure gaan gaste betower. Dit beloof om 'n heerlike dag te wees. Bespreek by Ena Jacobs by 082 416 5304.

8 March

Fundraiser concert with Voldi, Nikki and Tashia (18:00) at the Market Theatre. Enjoy an evening of music through the ages and support a fundraiser for Dawie Hechter, who was diagnosed with Non-Hodgkin lymphoma, a type of cancer that develops in the lymphatic system. Hechter needs to start intense treatment in Cape Town. Tickets cost R100 and are available from Alta (082 325 4989) or Tori (061 238 3318) or Heather (072 369 3304).

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
